subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved friends and handmaidens of God! Praise be unto God that ye are confirmed, successful and accepted at the Threshold of His oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و کنیزان عزیز الهی الحمد لله مویدید و موفق و مقبول در درگاه احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
